issues.description: resilience-review and resilience-audit cover the same domain (~85% overlap). resilience-review delegates to the resilience-reviewer agent; resilience-audit performs inline grep-based analysis with no agent delegation. Users cannot easily determine which to use.
issues.suggestion: Merge into resilience-review. Fold the inline grep analysis from resilience-audit into the resilience-reviewer agent as a scan step. Delete commands/resilience-audit.md.

issues.description: 66% of commands (approx 115/172) lack an 'After This' section or equivalent next-step guidance. Users complete a command and receive no suggestion on where to go next.
issues.suggestion: Establish a mandatory 'After This' section as a command authoring standard. Commands with natural successors should list 1-3 follow-on commands.

issues.description: guide.md contains 18+ task categories each with 4-5 steps, creating a flat structure of approximately 88 effective steps. This is not a command — it is an encyclopedia.
issues.suggestion: Refactor guide.md into a routing table: each category maps to the correct command to invoke. Remove inline instructions and delegate to the appropriate specialist commands instead.

issues.description: multi-execute.md contains 40 numbered steps across 5 phases. The external codeagent-wrapper binary dependency is not signaled in the command description frontmatter.
issues.suggestion: Add a prerequisite check as Step 1 that verifies codeagent-wrapper is installed. Collapse internal implementation phases to 5-6 user-visible steps.

issues.description: dep-audit, dep-update, sbom, and security-review form a 4-way overlap cluster. dep-audit performs vulnerability scanning that duplicates sbom and overlaps security-review.
issues.suggestion: Define non-overlapping scope boundaries: dep-audit = dependency graph + license compliance only; sbom = SBOM generation and attestation; security-review = code-level security.

issues.description: tdd.md nominally has 5 steps but the Red-Green-Refactor cycle is enumerated twice, creating 15 effective numbered items.
issues.suggestion: Collapse to a single Red-Green-Refactor enumeration.

issues.description: system-review.md exposes 25 internal implementation steps describing how the agent-system-reviewer orchestrates sub-agents.
issues.suggestion: Collapse to 5-6 user-facing steps. Move internal orchestration detail to the agent file.

issues.description: /deploy is documented as a gap in workflow-check.md J1 journey. Skills exist (deployment-patterns, ci-cd-patterns) but no command or agent.
issues.suggestion: Add commands/deploy.md or document that deployment is intentionally out of scope.

issues.description: multi-plan.md contains 23 steps and requires codeagent-wrapper with no graceful degradation path for users without the binary.
issues.suggestion: Add a preflight check step. Document the fallback: use /plan + /overnight instead.

issues.description: swift-build.md references the 'architect' agent for build error escalation. The correct agent is 'build-error-resolver'.
issues.suggestion: Replace architect reference with build-error-resolver in swift-build.md.

issues.description: claw.md uses environment variables ($CLAW_HOST, $CLAW_PORT) instead of $ARGUMENTS. The name 'claw' is opaque.
issues.suggestion: Add clear subtitle in description. Document env vars in Prerequisites section. Add After This section.

issues.description: eda-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /resilience-review — validate event bus failure modes; /add-observability — add consumer lag and dead-letter metrics.

issues.description: edge-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /performance-review; /security-review for edge authentication and TLS.

issues.description: iac-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /gitops-review; /security-review for hardcoded secrets.

issues.description: wasm-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /performance-review — profile WASM bundle size and execution time.

issues.description: webrtc-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /resilience-review for ICE failure modes; /security-review for DTLS.

issues.description: gitops-review lacks an After This section.
issues.suggestion: Add: After This: /security-review — scan manifests for secret leakage; /resilience-review — validate probe coverage.

issues.description: 'claw' is an opaque single-word name with no verb-noun structure.
issues.suggestion: Consider renaming to 'repl-connect' or add a description alias that explains the name.

issues.description: 'cfp' is an unexplained domain-specific acronym (Call For Papers).
issues.suggestion: Expand the description frontmatter to read: 'cfp — write a conference talk proposal (Call For Papers abstract)'.

issues.description: The doc-updater agent covers CONTRIBUTING.md, architecture tours, and changelogs but the /doc-update command only surfaces README and codemap workflows.
issues.suggestion: Expand commands/doc-update.md to document $ARGUMENTS variants (contributing, tour, changelog) or add separate commands.

naming_violations.issue: Single opaque word, no verb-noun structure

summary: 172 commands audited. Overall score: 8.0/10. Strong naming consistency (all lowercase-hyphen, zero violations), zero built-in conflicts, all 61 agents have command coverage. HIGH issues: resilience-review/resilience-audit 85% overlap; 66% of commands lack After This section; guide.md has ~88 steps; dep-audit/sbom/security-review triple overlap on vulnerability scanning.
